scenario: You are designing a mobile app for the Global admin of the organization. The organization wants to share this app with Microsoft 365 and Azure administrators to perform the following activities: 1) Create a user in Microsoft Entra ID/Microsoft 365; 2) Search for a user in Microsoft Entra ID/Microsoft 365; 3) Update user details in Microsoft Entra ID/Microsoft 365.
q: Which three of the following components should you use to implement this requirement? Each correct answer presents part of the solution.
why: Creating/searching/updating users in Microsoft Entra ID requires the Microsoft Graph API (the API that performs these directory CRUD operations). Because a canvas/mobile app cannot call Graph directly, wrap the Graph calls in an Azure Function and expose that function to the app through a Custom connector. The Office 365 Users connector can read/search user profiles but cannot CREATE users, and Dataverse custom actions/plug-ins operate on Dataverse data, not Entra ID directory objects.
